signatures: copy(deviceUuid: string, libraryUuid: string, targetLibraryUuid: string, targetClassification?: ILIB_ClassificationIndex | Array<string>, newDeviceName?: string): Promise<string | undefined>
returnSummary:
Promise<string \| undefined>

目标库内新器件的 UUID

params.name: libraryUuid
params.description: 库 UUID，可以使用 LIB\_LibrariesList 内的接口获取

params.name: newDeviceName
params.description: _（可选）_ 新器件名称，如若目标库内存在重名器件将导致复制失败
